channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: U.S. and China Compete in Open-Source AI Development
item.description: The article discusses the growing competition between the United States and China in the field of open-source artificial intelligence (AI). Both nations are investing heavily in AI research and develo...

item.title: Scientists Warn of Widespread Deoxygenation Threatening Global Ecosystems
item.description: A recent study highlights the alarming decline in oxygen levels across Earth's oceans and freshwater systems, linking this phenomenon to climate change, pollution, and human activity. Researchers emph...

item.title: Analyst Warns Democrats to Target Russell Vought, Trump's Key Advisor, Over Impeachment Concerns
item.description: The article discusses concerns over Russell Vought, the head of the White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB), who has been accused of undermining Congress by implementing spending cuts reject...

item.title: Louisa Zondo launches memorial forest to honor Riky Rick's legacy through tree planting
item.description: More than four years after Rikhado 'Riky Rick' Makhado's passing, his mother Louisa Zondo, alongside Kumi Naidoo and the Riky Rick Foundation, has transformed grief into a lasting tribute by establish...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates with Increased Attacks and Troop Injuries
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between the United States and Iran, focusing on intensified attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, which has disrupted global shipping. Over 100 U.S. service memb...

item.title: Nadra Official Missing in Karachi; Family Seeks Police Assistance
item.description: A National Database and Registration Authority (Nadra) official has gone missing in Karachi, prompting his family to approach the police for his recovery. The incident occurred on July 20, when Fayyaz...

item.title: Supreme Court Committee Reviews Aravalli Hill Range Conservation
item.description: The Supreme Court-constituted Aravalli committee has launched a 21-day feedback window to gather inputs on the conservation and management of the Aravalli hill range. Formed on May 25, the high-powere...

item.title: Kenyan Man Reunites with Childhood Friend in Australia After 18 Years
item.description: Tiberias Okang'a, a Kenyan man from Homa Bay County, stumbled upon his primary school classmate Collo in New South Wales, Australia. The two, who hadn't seen each other since their school days in Gwas...

item.title: BC Port Faces Security Concerns Despite Federal Fast-Track Status
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing security challenges at British Columbia's port, which has been flagged for a federal fast-track program. Despite the initiative aimed at improving efficiency and safe...

item.title: FRSC reports two fatalities in Abeokuta car crash involving Lexus and motorcycle
item.description: The Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) Ogun Sector Command confirmed that two people died in a road accident involving a black Lexus car (registration KJA 398 JR) and a black TVS motorcycle (AYT 837 QU)...

item.title: Police investigate killing of Kilombero land officer as land dispute emerges as possible motive
item.description: Police in Morogoro Region are carrying out investigations into the killing of Kilombero District Land Officer Zakaria Malika, who was attacked and killed at his home in Ifakara on Sunday night. Accord...

item.title: West Bengal minister criticizes Mamata Banerjee over Shaheed Diwas commemoration
item.description: West Bengal Minister Dilip Ghosh accused Trinamool Congress (TMC) leader Mamata Banerjee of betraying the memory of martyrs killed in the 1993 police firing during a protest. Ghosh claimed the July 21...

item.title: Resignation of Trump's AI Czar Highlights Ongoing Challenges in AI Regulation
item.description: Chris Fall, director of the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI), resigned after just three months in the role. This follows Collin Burns' abrupt departure earlier this year, who was reporte...

item.title: Neighbor's violent crime leaves family grappling with loss in court
item.description: The family of a woman who was tragically stabbed to death by her neighbor has shared their profound grief during a court proceeding. The incident, which occurred in July 2026, has sparked significant ...

item.title: Federal Court Grants N2bn Bail to Miyetti Allah Leader in Money Laundering Case
item.description: A Federal High Court in Abuja granted the National President of Miyetti Allah, Bello Bodejo, bail amounting to N2 billion in his ongoing trial related to an alleged $2.63 million money laundering case...

item.title: Spain Celebrates 2026 World Cup Victory with Grand Parade in Madrid
item.description: Spain's football team celebrated their historic 2026 FIFA World Cup victory with a massive victory parade in Madrid, drawing an estimated two million jubilant supporters. The parade, which featured th...

item.title: Nandi Senator Samson Cherargei Criticizes Edwin Sifuna's Paybill Fundraiser for Linda Mwananchi's Campaign
item.description: Nandi Senator Samson Cherargei has publicly criticized ODM Secretary General Edwin Sifuna for launching a paybill fundraiser to support Linda Mwananchi's 2027 presidential campaign. Cherargei argued t...

item.title: Albinism-linked discrimination in prison sparks legal action by Lissu's lawyer
item.description: Tundu Lissu's lawyer, Kulwa Maduhu, alleges he faced discrimination at Ukonga Prison due to his albinism, preventing him from meeting his client. The case, filed alongside colleagues, challenges priso...

item.title: Heavy Monsoon Rains in KP Result in 12 Deaths and Nationwide Flood Alerts
item.description: A severe monsoon outbreak in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) has claimed 12 lives over the past three days, with additional casualties reported due to flooding and landslides. The disaster has triggered a nat...

item.title: U.S. imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods in response to liquor and dairy restrictions
item.description: President Donald Trump has announced new 50% tariffs on Canadian goods, escalating trade tensions with Canada. The measure is a direct retaliation against U.S. restrictions on Canadian liquor and dair...
